---
name: 🐛 Bug Report
about: Create a report to help us improve Cognify
title: '[BUG] '
labels: bug
assignees: ''

---

## Describe the Bug
A clear and concise description of what the bug is. Please mention if it violates any layout rules (such as Title Case policies).

## Steps to Reproduce
Steps to reproduce the behavior:
1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. Scroll down to '...'
4. See error

## Expected Behavior
A clear and concise description of what you expected to happen.

## Screenshots / Screen Recordings
If applicable, add screenshots or videos to help explain your problem.

## Environment Details (please complete the following information):
- Device/Simulator: [e.g. iPhone 15 Simulator, Android Pixel 8]
- OS & Version: [e.g. iOS 17.2, macOS Sonoma]
- Expo/Metro Version: [e.g. Expo SDK 54]

## Additional Context
Add any other context about the problem here (such as console log outputs or Redux/App state details).
